title: Duplicate Charge Complaint
description: A free-tier customer reports being charged twice for a monthly subscription. The correct behavior is to classify as billing, assign medium urgency, route to the billing team, and offer duplicate charge reversal after acknowledging the issue.
customer_message: Hi, I was just charged twice for my subscription this month. I can see two charges of $9.99 on my bank statement from today. Please help!

policy_context.duplicate_charge_policy: Duplicate charges must be verified against billing records. If confirmed, reverse the duplicate charge within 5 business days.
